_README: Paste Zillow listing URLs into the array below. Each entry only needs `url` (or `address` for direct addresses without a listing). `label` and `notes` are optional free-form strings for readability. You do NOT need to provide a 'gut' verdict — the harness scores against objective sanity checks, not your guess. Run with `npm run calibrate`.

listings.label: Hoagland, IN — known-good SFR (regression anchor)
listings.notes: Regression anchor from §16.U — engine should produce a positive-CF SFR with sane numbers.

listings.label: Polson, MT — thin rental market SFR (regression anchor)
listings.notes: Regression anchor from §16.U — thin-market test, expect degraded comp confidence.
